title: chamomilla macrotis
intro: Chamomilla macrotis is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is commonly known as Large-flowered chamomile. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chamomilla macrotis include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation and sleep, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Chamomilla macrotis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and calmness.
